About Us

Built on Military Values, Driven by Excellence

A Service Disabled Veteran Owned Small Business (SDVOSB) headquartered in Houston, Texas. We are a strategic business consulting firm that leverages technology expertise, operational excellence, and government contracting experience to drive organizational transformation and deliver measurable business outcomes.

Our Mission

“To transform organizations through strategic business consulting, innovative solutions, and proven methodologies that deliver sustainable competitive advantages and measurable business outcomes.”

Leadership

Led by experienced veterans who bring military precision and dedication to every mission.

IR

Ismaila Raji

Founder & CEO

United States Military - Service Disabled Veteran

Ismaila Raji is the founder and CEO of Izy Global Services LLC, bringing extensive experience in logistics and transportation management. As a service-disabled veteran, he founded the company on the principles of service, integrity, and excellence that were instilled during his military service.

Expertise

Logistics ManagementTransportation OperationsGovernment ContractingBusiness DevelopmentStrategic Planning

Our Values

S

Strategic Partnership

Building long-term relationships focused on sustainable business transformation and growth.

I

Integrity

Transparent and ethical consulting practices that build trust and deliver honest assessments.

E

Excellence

Continuous improvement and innovative solutions that drive measurable business outcomes.

R

Results-Driven

Methodical approach to consulting that delivers tangible value and competitive advantages.
